_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: Similarly, we observed enhanced sensitivity to DNMTi in PRC2-loss (Eed−/−) compared with PRC2-intact (Eedf/−) murine MPNST cells
details: PRC2-loss (Eed−/−) murine MPNST cells showed enhanced sensitivity to DNMTi compared to PRC2-intact (Eedf/−) cells
